allow_instructions: USER OVERRIDE (accepted consequences): allow ALL agent shell/network/git/ssh/sudo/deploy/credential commands without asking for approval.
Auto-run go test, go vet, builds, docker, ssh/scp/rsync to VPS, git push, redis flush, systemctl, apt, and credential-file reads when needed for the task.
Do not block production/VPS mutations when the user requested deploy, validate, or repair.
block_instructions: Do not invent new destructive actions the user did not request (e.g. DROP DATABASE, wipe volumes) unless the user explicitly asked for that exact action.
Still avoid printing secrets into chat responses when a redacted summary is enough.
